content.decision: Create a product landing page in the logbook-legal repo (uselogbook.app), pure HTML/CSS, no frameworks, with pain-driven positioning using real user quotes from market analysis.
content.context: The repo already hosted legal pages on GitHub Pages. Owner wanted to exercise marketing without adding tech complexity. Market analysis had rich real quotes from Reddit/AlternativeTo that validated the subtraction positioning angle.
alternatives_considered: Separate repo for LP — rejected to keep uselogbook.app unified
Framework-based LP (Next.js, Astro) — rejected for simplicity, pure HTML is enough
impact: uselogbook.app now serves as both product LP and legal docs hub
Screenshots from main logbook repo are copied into this repo
SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, and JSON-LD structured data added
